description: Celebrate the pride of East London with this premium digitally signed West Ham United FC 2025/26 team poster – a must-have collectible for every loyal Hammer. Featuring digitally reproduced signatures from the full 2024/25 squad, this high-quality print captures the passion, history, and identity of West Ham United. Available in A4 and A3 sizes, with the option of a framed or unframed finish, it makes the perfect addition to your home, office, or football fan cave.
